# Automaziot AI

> Israeli AI automation agency. We build Hebrew-native AI agents, WhatsApp
> automations, voice agents, and CRM systems for SMBs. Tel Aviv + New York.
> Founded by Eyal Yakobi Miller. Every agent, workflow, and integration is
> fully owned by the client — no vendor lock-in.

## About
- [About & founder](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/about): company story, values, founder profile
- [Editorial standards](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/editorial-standards)
- [Accessibility statement](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/accessibility)

## Services (10 total, pricing in ILS)
- [WhatsApp AI Agent](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/whatsapp-agent): Hebrew-fluent agent on WhatsApp Business API, 24/7, from ₪3,500
- [Voice AI Agent](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/voice-agent): inbound/outbound phone agents
- [Lead Automation](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/lead-automation): ingestion, qualification, routing
- [CRM Setup](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/crm-setup): Zoho/HubSpot/Monday/Pipedrive/Salesforce configuration + automation
- [Sales Automation](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/sales-automation)
- [Calendar & Scheduling](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/calendar-scheduling)
- [E-commerce Automation](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/ecommerce-automation)
- [Custom AI Agents](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/custom-agents)
- [AI Consulting](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services/ai-consulting)
- [All services index](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/services)

## Pricing
- [Machine-readable pricing](https://www.automaziot.ai/pricing.md) — structured markdown tiers
- [Pricing page](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/pricing) — full HTML pricing matrix
- Range: ₪2,000 (entry CRM) to ₪25,000 (full AI consulting)
- Most engagements: ₪4,000–₪15,000 one-time setup

## Case studies
- [Nadlanist AI](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/case-studies/nadlanist-ai): real-estate platform — 4× lead reply rate, <30s response time, press coverage in Walla, ICE, Maariv
- [All case studies](https://www.automaziot.ai/en/case-studies)
